approach: Restored proof replay, reconstructed the missing four-orbit blocker, independently preflighted matched sequential and kmtotalizer CNFs, and submitted the fixed 20-leaf cold benchmark to the checkpointed lab.
summary: Proof replay is now portable, a fresh nontrivial inherited CNF proof replayed, and the missing 1,616-clause four-orbit blocker was exactly reconstructed. The matched encoding preflight passed: kmtotalizer has 20,160 fewer auxiliaries and 853 more clauses with an identical audited core. The full benchmark is running as lab job lab-covering-c1264-e9221dfd02b3; none of its live outputs is claimed here. The exact covering number remains open.
rationale: The deterministic reconstruction, independent audits, proof controls, and regression suite support a scoped infrastructure result. They do not cover the open frontier or satisfy either terminal verification contract.
claims: Pinned DRAT-trim revision 2e3b2dc0ecf938addbd779d42877b6ed69d9a985 and binary SHA-256 92f0aa9575ed519d66a99b8b1b3dde6ece4618ae4c202a3a4b200265dda0aa7a passed positive and negative controls.
The missing catalog-4 blocker reconstructs to exactly 1,616 clauses and SHA-256 d68f1de5f99cf6e56480a3778dd270e8abca276d192fdf19b354375422d6cad4.
For the audited preflight leaf, sequential and kmtotalizer share the same non-cardinality core; their auxiliary counts are 40,180 and 20,020 respectively.
No 40-cover was found and no open frontier node was excluded in this epoch.
evidence: python3 run_experiment.py ... rebuild-catalog4-blocker: reconstructed the recorded blocker hash
python3 run_experiment.py ... audit-rebuilt-catalog4-blocker: independently accepted 4 orbits and 1,616 images
python3 run_experiment.py ... cardinality-encoding-matched-preflight-v2: both matched audits passed
.venv/bin/python -m unittest discover -s tests -p test_*.py -v: 47 tests passed
Commit fd346a5 vendors the proof checker and records the durable checkpoint; a Git commit is not mathematical validation.
next_steps: Review the first immutable completion record for lab-covering-c1264-e9221dfd02b3.
Verify every completed unit's build hash, CNF audit, solver verdict, and DRAT receipt before authorizing another segment.
After all 40 runs, continue only if kmtotalizer has at least 8/20 verified closures and at least four more than sequential.
Redirect without extending identical timeouts if the acceptance rule fails.
experiments: .proof-experiments/20260722-145625-c29ea8: rebuilt the absent catalog-4 blocker with the recorded hash.
.proof-experiments/20260722-145649-c4a935: independent catalog audit accepted four orbits and 1,616 images.
.proof-experiments/20260722-150455-da6f28: final matched preflight passed; auxiliary reduction 20,160 and clause delta +853.
lab-covering-c1264-e9221dfd02b3: submitted/running; no live result claimed.
transfer_insights: Layered exact covering search -> predict that changing only the cardinality layer can alter reduced-instance closure -> matched structure passed preflight; performance remains pending.

established_facts.claim: The reconstructed four-orbit blocker has 1,616 clauses, covers 1,616 distinct group images, and matches the catalog-recorded hash.
established_facts.scope: The four preserved exact-degree C(11,5,3) link witnesses under C2 wr S5

established_facts.claim: The audited sequential and kmtotalizer preflight CNFs share non-cardinality core SHA-256 4d8416077f50a7958e0bfda78b9526b949906af8a8c9ef339c5c91d4b38b3269.
Kmtotalizer uses 20,020 auxiliaries versus sequential's 40,180 in the eleven audited equalities.
established_facts.evidence: Both build receipts and independent CNF audits

ruled_out.claim_or_route: Promote the 189 inherited historical UNSAT validation receipts as freshly replayed evidence.
ruled_out.scope: All inherited receipts whose referenced external.drat files are absent
ruled_out.reason: The proof bytes required by DRAT-trim were not preserved in this checkout.
ruled_out.reopen_condition: Recover every exact hash-matching CNF/proof pair and replay it with the pinned checker.

open_leads.description: Review and complete the matched 20-leaf encoding benchmark.
open_leads.rationale: It directly tests the current propagation bottleneck with replayable certificates.
open_leads.next_experiment: Inspect the newest immutable lab record for lab-covering-c1264-e9221dfd02b3 and authorize the next segment only if all gates pass.

open_leads.description: Degree-preserving positive local search under the forced matching.
open_leads.rationale: A positive 40-block witness has a much smaller acceptance surface than a global exclusion.
open_leads.next_experiment: Run a fixed-seed, equal-budget comparison against unconstrained local search only if the encoding benchmark is held or redirected.

strategy_proposals.mechanism: Use swaps maintaining 40 blocks and penalizing exact point/pair-degree violations with bitset delta scores for uncovered four-sets.
strategy_proposals.hypothesis: Constraint-preserving moves reach fewer uncovered four-sets than an equal-budget unconstrained control.
strategy_proposals.discriminating_test: Twenty fixed seeds with direct checking of any zero-defect witness.
strategy_proposals.rationale: It retains a compact positive certificate and is genuinely distinct from the negative SAT route.

strategy.mechanism: Replace only the 11 link-degree sequential counters with kmtotalizer while preserving and hash-comparing the non-cardinality core, then compare cold CaDiCaL runs with immediate DRAT replay.

continuation.objective: Review the first ten cold encoding runs and decide whether the checkpointed benchmark may continue.
continuation.first_action: Open the newest records/labs/lab-covering-c1264-e9221dfd02b3-*.json record and its content-addressed lab-runs output; verify progress, hashes, CNF audits, verdicts, and proof replays.
continuation.stop_condition: Stop or redirect on any core/cardinality/verdict mismatch, missing UNSAT proof, failed replay, projected proof storage above 30 GB, or final failure of the 8/20 plus-four rule.

candidate_profile.scholarly_question: Can a materially smaller cardinality encoding improve certified closure on the canonical link frontier for C(12,6,4)?
candidate_profile.meaningful_delta: A portable proof-replay toolchain, exact reconstruction of the missing four-orbit blocker, and a hash-bound matched benchmark with 50.1742% fewer cardinality auxiliaries.
candidate_profile.acceptance_test: Repository-reproducible preflight plus a completed benchmark satisfying the predeclared closure and proof-replay gates.

closest_prior_work.difference: Provides the maintained bound and construction, not a certified 40-block exclusion.
Uses layered exact search for a different mixed-clique covering problem, not this parameter set or matched encoding test.

novelty_searches.finding: The maintained source still reports the 40..41 gap.

novelty_searches.query: covering design SAT exact covering number
novelty_searches.finding: Found related layered SAT methodology on a different problem, not a settlement of C(12,6,4).

external_channel.acceptance_path: Submit only after a 40-block witness or complete independently validated exclusion certificate exists.

campaign_assessment.reason: The bounded discriminator is running under the lab lifecycle. Another model-side pass before its immutable review record exists would add no evidence.

search_efficiency.naive_space: A paired 60-second pass over all 47 canonical frontier nodes would allocate up to 94 solver CPU-minutes before proof replay; the underlying link universe is choose(462,20).
reductions_considered: retain the exact C2 wr S5 canonical quotient
search_efficiency.chosen_mechanism: Run 40 cold form-runs on 20 predeclared leaves, 42.6% of an all-frontier paired pass, without reusing solver state.
search_efficiency.estimated_or_measured_savings: Kmtotalizer uses 20,020 auxiliaries versus 40,180 for sequential, 20,160 fewer or 50.1742%; the sampled benchmark saves 57.4% of the solver allocation of an all-frontier paired pass.
search_efficiency.soundness_guard: Exact core reconstruction, hash-bound frontier membership, 66 boundary-semantic checks per CNF, direct SAT validation, and pinned DRAT replay for every UNSAT.

space_reduction.ambient_space: choose(462,20) exact-degree point-link block families inside the fixed perfect-matching representation
space_reduction.represented_space_before: 47 open canonical frontier nodes: 14 secondary nodes and 33 tertiary nodes
space_reduction.eliminated_or_quotiented: No frontier node was eliminated this epoch; 20 nodes were selected only for a route discriminator.
space_reduction.represented_space_after: 47 open canonical frontier nodes pending reviewed solver evidence
space_reduction.reduction_factor: none mathematically; benchmark allocation is 20/47 of the frontier
space_reduction.coverage_scope: Encoding preflight on leaf s-r0-3 and preparation of a fixed 20-leaf matched sample
space_reduction.soundness_basis: Every sample row is bound to the inherited open-frontier summary by root indices and exact result hash.
space_reduction.remaining_unknown: Whether either encoding closes the sampled leaves and whether the 47-node frontier contains another link orbit.
space_reduction.next_bulk_elimination: Review lab job lab-covering-c1264-e9221dfd02b3 and continue its next segment only if all correctness, replay, throughput, and storage gates pass.

tactical_learning.prediction: The two forms would have identical non-cardinality cores; sequential would use 40,180 auxiliaries, kmtotalizer 20,020, and kmtotalizer would add 853 clauses.
tactical_learning.observation: All predicted structural values matched. Both independent CNF audits passed 66 boundary checks and shared core SHA-256 4d8416077f50a7958e0bfda78b9526b949906af8a8c9ef339c5c91d4b38b3269.
tactical_learning.surprise: The catalog-4 blocker named by the catalog was absent and the restored checker was initially packaged as a non-portable nested Git link. The blocker was exactly reconstructed and the checker source was vendored.
tactical_learning.failure_signature: Hash-only historical validation receipts are not replayable when proof bytes are omitted; named generated blockers can likewise be absent despite retained catalog metadata.
tactical_learning.bottleneck_update: The remaining uncertainty is measured certified closure under the two encodings, not tool availability or matched-CNF construction.

reusable_assets.name: Pinned DRAT-trim toolchain
reusable_assets.use: Portable replay of all new UNSAT leaves

reusable_assets.name: Matched cardinality benchmark harness
reusable_assets.use: Checkpointed cold comparisons with CNF audits and proof replay

reusable_assets.name: Independent cardinality CNF auditor
reusable_assets.use: Reconstruct cores, check universes and auxiliary isolation, and run semantic boundary controls

constraints_learned.constraint: For the audited link formulation, kmtotalizer replaces 40,180 sequential auxiliaries with 20,020 while preserving the same primary-variable core.
constraints_learned.scope: Eleven equalities over the fixed C(11,5,3) link formulation generated by pinned python-sat 1.9.dev7

tactical_learning.next_discriminator: Review the first lab segment and count only replay-verified UNSAT results; after 40 runs apply the predeclared at-least-8 and plus-four gate.

prior_art_check.exact_delta: Historical work supplies the 41-block construction; the current route adds a proof-producing, symmetry-reduced exact-search harness with a matched alternative-cardinality comparison. The closest modern layered SAT covering work concerns a different mixed-clique problem.
prior_art_check.duplicate_risk: Alternative cardinality encodings and layered SAT search are standard; only a certified improvement on this exact frontier or a completed exclusion could constitute problem-specific progress.
prior_art_check.comparison_test: Matched cold sequential versus kmtotalizer runs on identical primary cores with replayed proofs.

field_progress_assessment.gate_id: Use the sourced contribution and verification contract.
field_progress_assessment.contribution_class: research infrastructure and bounded encoding-control result
field_progress_assessment.closest_prior_result: Maintained range 40 <= C(12,6,4) <= 41 with a 41-block simulated-annealing construction
field_progress_assessment.measurable_improvement: No covering bound improved; kmtotalizer reduced link-degree auxiliaries by 20,160 while preserving the audited core.
field_progress_assessment.independent_validation: Separately structured CNF auditor accepted both forms and ran 66 boundary-semantic checks per encoding.
field_progress_assessment.external_audience: Covering Repository maintainers after a terminal certificate exists
field_progress_assessment.remains_unproved: Existence or nonexistence of a 40-block C(12,6,4) cover
field_progress_assessment.route_recommendation: continue only through the predeclared reviewed benchmark; do not scale or raise timeouts unless its acceptance rule passes

lab_review.reason: Both canary segments passed the exact 41-cover check, checkpoint transition, correctness, throughput, and artifact-growth gates. Promotion is limited to orchestration capability.

hypothesis: Sequential and kmtotalizer forms of the same rooted link leaf have an identical independently reconstructed non-cardinality core, isolated exact-degree encodings with correct boundary behavior, and kmtotalizer uses substantially fewer auxiliary variables.
discriminating_test: Build both forms for one hash-bound frontier leaf, independently reconstruct every non-cardinality clause, audit auxiliary confinement, and solve 66 boundary assignments per encoding before authorizing the matched solver tranche.
independent_checker: checkers/audit_cardinality_encoding_cnf.py independently reconstructs the non-cardinality core and orbit partitions, checks each point universe and auxiliary range, and runs 66 boundary assignments per encoding. These controls are not a formal all-assignment proof of the PySAT encoder.
blocker: No verified 40-block witness or independently checked exhaustive exclusion exists. The current practical blocker is the unreviewed closure rate of the two cardinality encodings on the canonical 47-node frontier.
tool_disclosure: GPT-5.6 Sol principal designed, audited, and interpreted the epoch. A GPT-5.6 Terra delegate supplied an advisory experiment-verification memo; Sol independently checked the artifacts and did not treat model agreement as validation. Deterministic work used Python 3.12, python-sat 1.9.dev7, CaDiCaL 1.7.3, pinned DRAT-trim revision 2e3b2dc0ecf938addbd779d42877b6ed69d9a985, Git, SHA-256, unittest, and official-source web search.; orchestration: gpt-5.6-sol principal with gpt-5.6-terra delegates.
policy_flags: Attempt evidence did not validate; durable progress is withheld.
review_status: evidence invalid or incomplete; not durable progress

json_repair.policy: serialization-only; protected outcome and classification fields must remain unchanged
